variant_notes.latin_american: Dominates Americas; 'ustedes' plural; vocab e.g. 'computadora', 'carro', 'celular'; neutral often used for broad reach (ATA).
variant_notes.castilian: Spain: 'vosotros', 'ordenador', 'coche', 'móvil'; ceceo/theta in some; more formal media tone.

spanish.register_system: Tú (informal/peers), Usted (formal/respect); voseo regional in LatAm; written uses heavy subjunctive/formality. Translators err: ignoring audience (e.g. tú in Mexico business offends) or over-formalizing (stiffness).
translationese_traps: Literal calques ('en el caso de' vs natural); passive/reflexive overuse; false friends (actualmente=currently; realizar=perform); Baker collocation/ser-estar mismatches; Venuti 'doughy' domestication failures.

document_conventions.legal: Civil law; long/repetitive for precision; notarized; jurisdiction-specific terms (ICR/ATA challenges vs English common law).
document_conventions.business: Polite formulas/salutations; DD/MM/YYYY; neutral vocab for intl.

return_to_original_risks: Formality/variant drift in EN edit; regional vocab/idiom erasure; anglicisms or subjunctive loss on back-translation; highest in legal term re-insertion.
spanish.idiom_mapping_notes: Functional/dynamic equivalence (Nida/Baker priority over literal); clusters (food/emotion/business proverbs e.g. 'poner los puntos sobre las íes' -> clarify); domesticate for target fluency (Venuti) unless literary foreignization.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Trilled 'rr' vs flap 'r' (practice 'perro'); clear open vowels no reduction; regional 'll/y' or ceceo; syllable-timed rhythm.
spanish.orthography_notes: Acute accents (stress/meaning e.g. papa/papá); ñ; inverted ¿¡; RAE standard with minor regional lexical diffs.
professional_resources: Real Academia Española (DLE/DPD); ATA Spanish cert/guidelines; Fundéu; Baker 'In Other Words'; Venuti applications; bilingual legal glossaries.

variant_notes.european: Strict vous/formal; anglicisms flexible; elevated literary.
variant_notes.canadian: More tu even business; stricter anti-anglicisms (Bill 96); Québec vocab; context-dependent.

french.register_system: Tu informal vs Vous formal (CA looser tu); niveaux soutenu/courant/familier. Traps: faux amis or wrong politeness in Quebec docs.
translationese_traps: Faux amis (actuellement=currently; éventuellement=possibly); 'de la' genitives; passive 'on'; English word order/stiffness.
return_to_original_risks: Formality collapse (vous->tu); accent/gender loss; variant split ignored; faux amis re-entry.
french.idiom_mapping_notes: Functional (e.g. 'avoir le cafard' equiv mood); Baker strategies; food/body clusters; Venuti foreignize literary.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Nasal vowels (bon/on); liaison linking; uvular r; silent letters; grouped rhythm.
french.orthography_notes: Accents (é/è/ç/â); gender agreement strict; lower caps than English.
professional_resources: Académie Française; OQLF (CA); ATA/ITI; Baker/Venuti; Larousse/Le Robert; bilingual legal.

italian.register_system: Tu informal vs Lei formal/polite; written elevated. Trap: over-casual business.
translationese_traps: False friends (English/Spanish overlap); article overuse; tense shifts; syntax calques.
return_to_original_risks: Gender/number agreement loss; formality shift; idiom dilution.
italian.idiom_mapping_notes: Functional for proverbs; avoid literal body idioms.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Geminate/double consonants; rolled r; open/closed e/o.
professional_resources: Accademia della Crusca; ATA; sworn translator lists; dictionaries.

german.register_system: Du informal vs Sie formal (business default); registers from colloquial to Hochdeutsch. Traps: wrong Sie/case.
translationese_traps: Literal compounds/splits; genitive/passive; verb-final position; ASCII umlaut/ß ignore.
return_to_original_risks: Compound/case recreation fail; ß/umlaut loss; formality drop.
german.idiom_mapping_notes: Functional ('auf die Nerven gehen'); literal compounds risky.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Umlauts shift vowels (ä~cat); sharp ß; final devoicing.
german.orthography_notes: Umlauts äöü; ß (ẞ capital); all nouns capitalized.

japanese.register_system: Keigo mandatory: sonkeigo (respect listener), kenjougo (humble self), teineigo (polite); hierarchy critical. Trap: inconsistent levels = offense.
japanese.keigo_notes: Japanese honorific speech system — critical for document register; sonkeigo/kenjougo/teineigo encode social distance; essential in business/legal (wrong use disastrous).
translationese_traps: Omitted subjects/particles; keigo flattening; Western directness.
return_to_original_risks: Keigo level mismatch; kanji nuance loss; politeness erasure on roundtrip.
japanese.idiom_mapping_notes: Heavy functional (kanji compounds/cultural); nature/duty clusters; rare literal.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Mora-timed (not stress); pitch accent; r-flap (no l/r).
professional_resources: JTF/business keigo guides; ATA; kanji dicts; Venuti cultural.

mandarin.register_system: Baihua vs wenyan remnants; context/honorific vocab for formal. Trap: wrong script or tone-ignored pinyin.
translationese_traps: English SVO/word order; literal chengyu; particle overuse; simp/trad mix.
return_to_original_risks: Script/tone loss; chengyu flattening; pinyin interference.
mandarin.idiom_mapping_notes: Chengyu functional key (4-char); Nida dynamic; special handling clusters.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: 4 tones + neutral; retroflex sounds; no clusters.
professional_resources: Xinhua; ATA Chinese; govt styles; Baker chengyu.

variant_notes.msa: Modern Standard Arabic — for formal documents (written only).

arabic.script_notes: right-to-left, no short vowel marking in MSA, abjad system
arabic.register_system: MSA high/formal written; diglossia major. Trap: dialect bleed or unnatural MSA.
arabic.diglossia_note: the gulf between written MSA and spoken dialects — critical for document work; MSA mandatory formal, dialects for natural spoken adaptation.
translationese_traps: Vowel/ diacritic issues; long sentences; Sharia term mismatch; punctuation fluidity.

document_conventions.legal: Sharia influence; repetitive; formal MSA (no fixed punct).

return_to_original_risks: Vowel/di acritic corruption; diglossia shift; RTL issues; religious/secular term drift.
professional_resources: Al-Mu'jam; El-Farahaty legal Arabic; ATA; IATE.

portuguese.register_system: Você/tu (BR warmer); formal varies. Trap: variant mixing.
translationese_traps: Pronoun position (enclitic/proclitic); vocab mix; literal idioms.
return_to_original_risks: Variant inconsistency; pronoun/accent shift; idiom loss.
portuguese.idiom_mapping_notes: Functional; adapt regional (some ENG-shared); cultural substitution.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: BR open vowels/nasals; EU reduced/guttural; tilde nasal.
professional_resources: Academia das Ciências (PT); ABL (BR); ATA; Priberam/Casa da Língua.
